message:
fix(core): propagate write errors in SQL dump, harden IPC and audit hash

- backup.rs: replace 8x writeln!().ok() with proper error propagation via
  map_err — previously, write failures during SQL dump produced silently
  truncated/corrupted backups that appeared successful
- ipc.rs: replace unwrap_or_default() with unwrap_or_else providing valid
  JSON error fallbacks — previously sent empty string to clients on
  serialization failure
- recorder_audit.rs: return sentinel string and log error instead of
  hashing empty string when serialization fails — previously produced
  bogus SHA-256 hash that silently corrupted the audit chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
